titleImg.first: Translation of french texts in other languages

whoAmI.wholistOne: My name is Rodolphe Quéau, I'm a freelance translator-interpreter specializing in German, French and English languages ​​and am able to do both translation and interpretation.
whoAmI.wholistTwo: I have already done English-French translations for the legal, medical and cybersecurity sectors as well as German-French translations with the technical and environmental sectors.
whoAmI.wholistThree: Always passionate about foreign languages, I studied Applied Foreign Languages ​​at the Catholic University of the West in Angers where I obtained a degree in Applied Foreign Languages ​​with a minor in Language and Culture.
whoAmI.wholistFour: Despite the fact that I had a Scientific Baccalaureate, my interest has always been in foreign languages ​​for as long as I can remember and already had a very good level in English in high school, having obtained the B2 in English at 17 years old.

educations.educ2-H4: Université Catholique de l'Ouest - Bretagne Nord et Angers
educations.educ2-P: Licence Langues Etrangères Appliquées, mineure Langue et Culture

contactSection.contactTitle: Do you have a new project to translate ?

tradServices.textList-One: Translating is not just about finding an equivalent from one language to another, it is about transcribing as best as possible the spirit of the original document so that it is completely understood by speakers of the target language, without distorting its meaning.
tradServices.textList-Two: Being bilingual is not enough; the translator must above all have a perfect command of his or her mother tongue and know how to bring out all its subtleties.
tradServices.textList-Three: In addition, we advise you to contact an expert in their field of specialty.

translationInterpretation.translationServiceText: Here are the services proposed for a translation
translationInterpretation.personnalDocumentText: Translation of lettres manuscrites ou dactylographiées, témoignages...
translationInterpretation.officialDocumentText: Translation of official documents ou certification de documents déjà traduits : Permis de conduire, certificat de mariage...
translationInterpretation.DocumentText: Translation of documents commerciaux : plaquettes, guides, tarifs, déclaration de douanes, documents de transports, commandes, factures...
translationInterpretation.interpretationServiceText: Here are the services proposed for an interpretation
translationInterpretation.ConsecutiveSiteText: Consecutive interpreting (each interlocutor waiting for the end of the translation in progress to continue), carried out at the meeting location. Travel costs counted in addition to the duration of the service.
translationInterpretation.ConsecutivePhoneText: Consecutive interpreting (each interlocutor waiting for the end of the translation in progress to continue), carried out at the meeting location. Communication costs counted in addition to the duration of the service.
